title: Implement CLI/MCP feedback selection contract and shared selector

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: hard cut CLI from --max-samples to --max-items, add --sampling-mode newest|random (default newest), enforce sample-seed only for random mode, default max-items=200, wire same semantics into MCP and both feedback evaluation code paths via one shared selector + metadata transparency + tests/docs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented hard-cut feedback selection contract across CLI, MCP, and core evaluation paths. Replaced max-samples with max-items (default 200), added sampling-mode newest|random, enforced sample-seed only for random mode, and made days optional for all-time backfill when omitted. Added shared selector utility in plexus/utils/feedback_selection.py and wired it into FeedbackEvaluation plus FeedbackItems-backed accuracy path. Persisted selection metadata in evaluation parameters including sampling_mode, requested_max_items, candidate_pool_count, selected_count, sample_seed, selection_order_basis, selected_feedback_item_ids, and shortfall_count. Updated docs snippets and value-function protocol fields to max_items/sampling_mode. Updated lint rule so FeedbackItems days is optional. Validation passed with py_compile and pytest suites for feedback selection helper, feedback runner, feedback CLI integration, evaluation value function, optimization policy, Evaluation feedback tests (targeted), and FeedbackItems tests.

comments.author: ryan
